chk_recurrences_either_account_or_card.name: chk_recurrences_either_account_or_card
chk_recurrences_either_account_or_card.value: ("recurrences"."account_id" IS NOT NULL) <> ("recurrences"."credit_card_id" IS NOT NULL)

chk_transactions_either_account_or_card.name: chk_transactions_either_account_or_card
chk_transactions_either_account_or_card.value: ("transactions"."account_id" IS NOT NULL) <> ("transactions"."credit_card_id" IS NOT NULL)

chk_transactions_transfer_direction.name: chk_transactions_transfer_direction
chk_transactions_transfer_direction.value:
("transactions"."type" = 'transfer' AND "transactions"."transfer_direction" IS NOT NULL)
          OR ("transactions"."type" <> 'transfer' AND "transactions"."transfer_direction" IS NULL)
